items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-81 northbound between Exit 170B: PA 309 NORTH - WILKES-BARRE and 1 miles NORTH of Exit 175: PA 315 NORTH/I-476 TURNPIKE - DUPONT/PITTSTON. All lanes closed.
